summary: Completed frontend testing of dashboard header brand 'izlek' improvements. All visual and functional requirements successfully validated in both light and dark modes.
passed_tests: Font size increased to 39.2px (~2.45rem) for better visibility
Letter spacing increased to 2.352px (~0.06em) for premium feel
Left padding of 8px added via parent container to prevent wall-sticking
No visible background, border, or badge styling (clean text-only design)
Dark mode applies subtle gradient text effect (linear-gradient with background-clip: text)
Light mode maintains plain text styling with stronger typography
Brand click navigation functionality works correctly
Header layout structure remains intact with no regressions
Theme toggle functionality works without affecting brand styling
